title: 10 best herbal capsules for over bleeding during periods
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for over bleeding during periods are a natural supplement designed to alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding, also known as menorrhagia. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbal extracts such as turmeric, ginger, and Vitex agnus-castus, which help to reduce blood loss by soothing the uterus and promoting healthy circulation. For example, Turméricare and Gingerplex capsules have been shown to significantly reduce menstrual flow and cramping, allowing women to return to their daily activities with ease. By taking these herbal supplements, women can experience improved quality of life during their periods, reducing anxiety and stress related to heavy bleeding.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain a blend of herbs that work synergistically to regulate hormonal imbalances. The Chinese angelica root in dong quai has been traditionally used to treat menstrual disorders, including excessive bleeding. By normalizing blood flow and promoting uterine contractions, dong quai capsules help reduce heavy bleeding and alleviate cramps associated with menstruation. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties may also contribute to a reduction in bleeding, making them a natural and effective remedy for managing period-related issues.
remedy_properties: Antihemorrhagic properties: Dong Quai capsules contain compounds that help to stop or reduce bleeding by promoting blood clotting and platelet aggregation, which can alleviate heavy menstrual flow.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules' anti-inflammatory effects may help to reduce inflammation in the uterus and cervix, which can contribute to excessive bleeding during menstruation.

Blood vessel-constricting properties: Dong Quai's ability to constrict blood vessels may help to reduce blood flow to the uterus, which can decrease menstrual bleeding and alleviate symptoms of heavy periods.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, the roots help to tone and strengthen the uterine muscles, reducing excessive bleeding.
Rhyzomes: Containing mucilages, the rhyzomes soothe and protect the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality angelica sinensis roots dried to perfection for optimal potency.
Grind the dried angelica sinensis roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 4:1 ratio of powdered angelica sinensis with inert filler material such as silica or potato starch.
Fill empty capsules with a mixture of 250-500 mg of the powder blend for optimal dosage.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain a potent combination of flavonoids, terpenes, and other bioactive compounds that work in harmony to alleviate menstrual cramps and heavy flow. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce uterine contractions, while their antioxidant properties protect the endometrium from damage, leading to a decrease in bleeding intensity and duration. Additionally, the capsules may also help to regulate hormonal balance, further contributing to reduced bleeding and a more manageable menstrual experience.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties: Ginkgo biloba extracts have been shown to reduce inflammation and relax uterine muscles, which can help alleviate heavy bleeding and cramping associated with menstrual periods.

Antioxidant and free radical scavenging activities: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties can help neutralize excessive oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which may contribute to excessive bleeding during menstruation.

Vasodilatory effects: The extracts of Ginkgo biloba have been found to dilate blood vessels and improve circulation, which can help reduce menstrual bleeding and alleviate symptoms such as heavy periods, cramps, and bloating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree have anti-inflammatory and astringent properties that help to reduce menstrual bleeding and alleviate symptoms of dysmenorrhea.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree contain compounds that can help to constrict blood vessels, thereby reducing heavy bleeding during menstruation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees in early summer or late fall.
Dry the ginkgo biloba leaves in a warm well-ventilated area for at least 48 hours.
Crush 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into small pieces using mortar and pestle.
Mix the crushed ginkgo biloba with 50 grams of gelatin capsules and fill to desired dosage.
Seal the filled capsules in airtight containers and store them in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese peony capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain a unique blend of herbs that help to regulate menstrual flow. The peony root, in particular, is known for its ability to stop excessive bleeding by tonifying the blood and stopping internal bleeding. Additionally, the capsules also help to calm the uterus and alleviate cramps, further reducing the amount of bleeding. By addressing the root causes of heavy periods, Chinese peony capsules provide natural relief and promote overall menstrual health.
remedy_properties: Antihemorrhagic property: The capsules contain compounds that help to stop or reduce bleeding by constricting blood vessels and reducing blood flow to the uterus, thereby alleviating heavy menstrual bleeding.

Stabilizing effect on blood: Chinese Peony Capsules have been shown to stabilize blood clots and prevent their formation, which can help to reduce excessive bleeding and alleviate symptoms of menorrhagia.

Regulating effect on uterine contractions: The capsules contain compounds that help to regulate uterine contractions, which can help to reduce heavy menstrual bleeding by reducing the frequency and intensity of contractions.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes of Chinese Peony are used to treat excessive menstrual bleeding due to their ability to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation.
Roots: The roots of Chinese Peony have been shown to exhibit anticoagulant properties, making them effective in controlling heavy menstrual bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried paeonia lactiflora root powder from a reputable supplier weighing approximately 500 grams.
Combine equal parts of dried paeonia lactiflora root powder and vitamin b6 supplement in a glass bowl for a total of 1000 milligrams.
Mix the combined ingredients with a small amount of water to create a smooth paste using a wooden spoon taking about 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 250 milligrams of the prepared herbal mixture using an automatic capsule filler and store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.
Consume one capsule twice daily for a minimum of 3 cycles or as directed by a healthcare professional and monitor menstrual bleeding patterns for optimal results taking about 8 weeks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural ability to tone and strengthen the uterine muscles, reducing excessive blood flow. The herb's astringent properties also help to constrict blood vessels, which can alleviate heavy menstrual bleeding. Additionally, hawthorn has anti-inflammatory properties that may reduce cramping and discomfort associated with over bleeding. By promoting healthy circulation and regulating blood flow, hawthorn capsules can provide natural relief for women experiencing excessive bleeding during their menstrual cycle.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Hawthorn's antioxidant compounds help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to excessive menstrual bleeding by reducing uterine contractions and improving blood vessel walls.

Vasorelaxing properties: Hawthorn's flavonoids and procyanidins can relax the smooth muscles in blood vessels, reducing blood pressure and alleviating vasoconstriction, which can help reduce heavy bleeding during menstruation.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Hawthorn's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce prostaglandin production, which is responsible for causing uterine contractions and increased menstrual bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the hawthorn plant have been traditionally used to treat menstrual disorders, including excessive bleeding, due to their astringent properties.
Buds: Hawthorn buds are rich in flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), which have been shown to help reduce bleeding by improving blood vessel tone and reducing capillary fragility.
remedy_recipe: Harvest crataegus monogyna leaves and flowers in late summer or early fall.
Dry the plant material for at least 24 hours using a food dehydrator on low temperature.
Grind 250 grams of dried crataegus monogyna into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1000 milligrams of ground crataegus monogyna with 500 milliliters of distilled water to create an infusion.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared infusion and seal tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Silk tree capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural ability to regulate menstrual flow. The capsules contain a compound called albizzin, which has been shown to constrict blood vessels and reduce excessive bleeding. Additionally, the herb has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe the uterus and alleviate cramps associated with heavy bleeding. By taking silk tree capsules regularly, women can experience relief from prolonged or heavy menstrual bleeding, allowing them to manage their periods more effectively.
remedy_properties: Astringent Properties: Herbal Silk Tree Capsules have astringent properties, which help to constrict or reduce blood vessel size, thereby decreasing menstrual flow and alleviating heavy bleeding.

Antioxidant Activity: The capsules possess antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the uterus, which can contribute to heavy menstrual bleeding.

Haemostatic Effect: Herbal Silk Tree Capsules have a haemostatic effect, meaning they help to promote blood clotting and reduce bleeding by inhibiting platelet aggregation and promoting the production of thromboxane A2.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the silk tree plant have been traditionally used to treat menstrual irregularities and excessive bleeding due to their ability to stabilize blood flow and regulate hormonal imbalances.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes, which are underground stems that store energy for the plant, are believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate heavy menstrual bleeding and reduce cramping.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried albizia julibrissin flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the powdered flower extract with 100g of potato starch in a bowl and mix well for 5 minutes to create a uniform blend.
Add 50g of gelatin to the blend and stir gently for 3 minutes until it is fully incorporated and forms a smooth paste.
Fill empty capsules with one teaspoon of the prepared powder mixture, placing 100 capsules in a sterilized container for immediate use or storage for up to six months.

Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for not more than 12 hours before consumption during menstruation, taking two capsules every four hours as needed for relief from excessive bleeding.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain natural compounds that help to regulate hormone levels, particularly estrogen. The capsules are rich in phytoestrogens, which have been shown to mimic the effects of estrogen and help to reduce heavy menstrual bleeding. Additionally, dandelion root has anti-inflammatory properties that may also contribute to its ability to alleviate bleeding symptoms by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy blood clotting. By addressing hormonal imbalances and inflammation, dandelion capsules can provide effective relief from excessive bleeding during menstruation.
remedy_properties: Astringent properties: Dandelion capsules contain tannins, which have astringent properties that help to constrict blood vessels and reduce blood flow, thereby reducing excessive menstrual bleeding.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds like kaempferol, which can help to reduce inflammation in the uterus and surrounding tissues, which may contribute to heavy bleeding during menstruation.

Hormone-regulating properties: Dandelion contains phytoestrogens, which may help to regulate hormonal imbalances that can lead to excessive menstrual bleeding by normalizing estrogen levels and promoting healthy uterine function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help reduce blood clotting time and alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding.
Fruits: Containing high amounts of vitamin K, which plays a crucial role in blood coagulation and helps regulate abnormal bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Gather 100g of dried taraxacum officinale herb, also known as dandelion root, for its anti-inflammatory properties.
Grind the 100g dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder within 5 minutes.
Mix 250mg of the powdered taraxacum officinale with 500mg of potato starch in a small bowl to create a blend for filling capsules, taking about 2 minutes.
Fill #0 empty vegetable capsules with the blend using an automatic capsule filler or by hand with a spoon and funnel within 5 minutes per batch of 100 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 1 year, allowing for consistent potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain a natural extract that regulates hormonal balance, particularly progesterone levels. This helps to normalize uterine lining shedding, reducing excessive blood flow and alleviating symptoms of heavy menstrual bleeding. Additionally, the herb's anti-inflammatory properties may also help to reduce swelling and ease cramps associated with dysmenorrhea, making it an effective natural remedy for addressing menstrual irregularities.
remedy_properties: Daucosterol content: Chaste Tree capsules contain daucosterol, a compound that helps to regulate estrogen and progesterone levels in the body, which can help to reduce excessive bleeding during menstruation by normalizing hormonal imbalances.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in Chaste Tree capsules help to protect the uterine lining from damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and promoting healthy healing of the uterus during menstruation, which can help to minimize bleeding.

Prostaglandin regulation: Chaste Tree capsules have been shown to regulate prostaglandins, hormone-like substances that play a crucial role in menstruation. By regulating prostaglandins, Chaste Tree capsules may help to reduce excessive bleeding and alleviate other symptoms associated with heavy menstrual flow.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chaste tree plant have been traditionally used to stop excessive menstrual bleeding due to their ability to constrict blood vessels and reduce uterine contractions.
Seeds: Chaste tree seeds contain a unique compound called casticin, which has been shown to have antispasmodic properties that can help alleviate cramping and heavy bleeding during menstruation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried vitex agnus-castus fruit in amounts of 200 grams for each capsule.
Grind the dried fruit into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix the ground powder with 100 milliliters of vegetable glycerin and 10 milliliters of distilled water for 5 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to an encapsulating machine and fill capsules with 250 milligrams of the preparation for 30 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in airtight containers at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This compound helps to reduce inflammation in the uterus, which can contribute to excessive bleeding during menstruation. Additionally, glycyrrhizin has been found to help tone the uterine lining, reducing its tendency to bleed excessively. By taking herbal licorice capsules regularly, women may experience a reduction in heavy menstrual bleeding and cramping, providing relief from uncomfortable symptoms associated with PMS.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Glycyrrhizin, a key compound in licorice root, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the uterine lining, which can lead to heavy menstrual bleeding.
Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in licorice root have been shown to exert a vasoconstrictive effect, helping to narrow blood vessels and reduce bleeding by constricting the uterine arteries.

Saponins: Saponins in licorice root have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to soothe and calm the uterus, reducing inflammation and cramping associated with heavy menstrual bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, licorice roots help reduce uterine inflammation and alleviate heavy menstrual bleeding.
Rhyzomes: Containing triterpenoids, licorice rhyzomes work to regulate hormonal balance and ease menstrual cramps associated with over bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Dry 200g of fresh glycyrrhiza glabra roots in a warm oven at 60°c for 2 hours and store them in an airtight container.
Grind 100g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 300mg of gelatin and 1 tablespoon of distilled water to form a uniform paste, let it sit for 10 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 400mg of the mixture and seal them immediately, store in an airtight container at room temperature.
Take one capsule twice daily after meals for 7 consecutive days during periods or as directed by a healthcare professional.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because it has a natural ability to constrict blood vessels, reducing excessive menstrual flow. The herb's flavonoids and saponins work together to strengthen uterine walls and stabilize hormone levels, leading to a more balanced menstrual cycle. By regulating uterine contractions and blood vessel tone, stinging nettle capsules help alleviate heavy bleeding, cramping, and discomfort associated with menstruation.
remedy_properties: Vitamin K: Stinging nettle contains high amounts of vitamin K, which helps to promote blood clotting and reduce excessive bleeding during menstruation.
Iron: Nettle is rich in iron, an essential mineral that plays a crucial role in the production of hemoglobin, which helps to carry oxygen throughout the body and reduce menstrual bleeding.

Astringent properties: The astringent compounds present in nettle capsules help to constrict blood vessels and reduce capillary fragility, thereby decreasing excessive menstrual bleeding and cramping.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce excessive bleeding and promote wound healing.
Seeds: Contain omega-3 fatty acids and other nutrients that support uterine health, reducing the risk of heavy bleeding and improving menstrual regularity.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of fresh urtica dioica leaves and stems in the early morning when dew is present.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator at 40°c for 6 hours or air drying for 24 hours.
Crush the dried plant material into small pieces to release its essential oils and then sift through a fine-mesh sieve to obtain powdered extract.
Mix one part of the powdered urtica dioica extract with two parts of vegetable cellulose to create a uniform blend and fill capsules with 250 milligrams of the blend each.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate them for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with over bleeding during periods because they contain mucilage, a thick, protective gel-like substance that soothes and calms the lining of the uterine walls. This natural compound reduces inflammation and irritation, allowing the menstrual flow to normalize and reducing excessive bleeding. Additionally, marshmallow capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that help to constrict blood vessels, further minimizing bleeding. By promoting a healthy and balanced uterine environment, marshmallow capsules provide effective relief from heavy or prolonged menstrual bleeding.
remedy_properties: Mucilages: Marshmallow root contains mucilages, which are thick, protective substances that can help soothe and protect the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and bleeding.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: The plant contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which can help reduce prostaglandin production, a hormone that causes contractions and increased blood flow during menstruation, leading to less bleeding.
Astringent properties: Marshmallow root also has astringent properties, which can help constrict the uterine lining and reduce blood flow, further alleviating excessive bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and protect the uterine lining, reducing heavy menstrual bleeding.
Barks: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce inflammation and ease cramping associated with excessive bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried marshmallow root althaea officinalis in amounts of 2 tablespoons and sift through a fine-mesh sieve to remove debris.
Combine the sifted marshmallow root with 2 cups of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass measuring cup for an infusion time of 10-15 minutes.
Strain the infused mixture through a cheesecloth or a clean cotton cloth into another heat-resistant container discarding the solids.
Allow the liquid to cool down to room temperature and then transfer it to an ice cube tray filling each cavity to prepare herbal compresses for 20 minutes of freezing time.
Once frozen, remove the herbal compresses from the ice cube tray and place one in a gelatin capsule along with 500mg of vitamin e oil for oral administration as needed.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat over bleeding during periods with herbal capsules is to take a combination of Turmeric and Ginger capsules. Turmeric contains Curcumin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce blood flow and ease cramps, while Ginger helps to soothe the uterus and promote healing. This natural blend can effectively manage heavy menstrual bleeding, reducing discomfort and promoting overall well-being.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to over bleeding during periods that are treated with herbal capsules are dysmenorrhea, endometriosis, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). These conditions can cause heavy menstrual bleeding, irregular cycles, and cramps. Herbal capsules containing ingredients such as turmeric, ginger, and omega-3 fatty acids may help alleviate symptoms by reducing inflammation, regulating hormones, and improving blood clotting.
